creator: maxim.usatov@bcsatellite.net
text: This is similar to bug #275063 and #274698 - kernel stuck with 100% in arc_prune, in FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE releng/13.3-n257428-80d2b634ddf0. Can reproduce every time by doing rsync from internal ZFS NVMe storage to an external UFS SATA drive attached via USB.
